clarification_templates.default: Please clarify your request so I can proceed safely.
clarification_templates.missing_target: I need a specific target to continue. What object or location should I use?
clarification_templates.ambiguous_command: Your command sounds ambiguous. Please restate with explicit action and target.
clarification_templates.low_transcript_confidence: I did not confidently understand that. Please repeat your command clearly.
clarification_templates.unsafe_action_request: I cannot execute that request safely. Please provide a safer alternative.
